content.en:
Void Sacred Tree Space.

A figure suddenly came in, and the Vast Sea Ancestor, who had been staying here, was stunned.

It stands to reason that no one should be able to find it here, right?

The space where the Void Sacred Tree is located is automatically hidden, if there are no accurate coordinates, it is impossible to shuttle in at all, and the person who comes must have sensed the coordinates here and came in.

But even if the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master betrayed him and revealed all the things about the Void Sacred Tree to all the domain ancestors, those domain ancestors would not be able to find this place.

Only when the Void Sacred Fruit is truly ripe and the power of the Void Sacred Tree radiates to the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm can the Domain Ancestors in the outside world perceive the existence of the Void Sacred Tree.

Besides, if you don't know about the Void Sacred Tree, and you still think it's just an ordinary treasure, you may not necessarily come.

"Return to the One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor!"

When the Vast Sea Ancestor saw Ye Tian's cultivation, not only did he not calm down, but he became nervous.

If he hadn't guessed wrong, it was very likely that this person would be the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor.

"Your Excellency is the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor?"

Haohai Ancestor asked.

"Yes, it's me!" Ye Tian admitted.

"It's mine!"

Ye Tian didn't give the ancestor of the vast sea of face at all, and directly announced the ownership here.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, this Void Sacred Tree is mine, and I personally planted it here, why do you occupy this place?"

Haohai Haizu was not convinced.

At this time, Ye Tian made a move.

"Five Elements Ban!"

As soon as this holy technique came out, it instantly sealed the Vast Sea Ancestor.

Compared to Ye Tian, Haohai Ancestor was too weak, and he didn't have the strength to resist at all.

"Wanfa Dao Ancestor, what are you doing here?"

The Mighty Sea Ancestor said in fear.

Ye Tian smiled, "It's nothing, it's just to capture you, the daughter of the last Heavenly Emperor, that is, the Cold Moon Palace Lord in your mouth, she asked me to help her take revenge." So, I will capture you, seal your cultivation, and let her kill you!"

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, please, let me go, I can give up the Void Holy Fruit!"

The Ancestor of the Great Sea begged for mercy.

"I don't need you to give up, because the Void Holy Fruit already belongs to me, is it possible that you are still sure that you can't grab it from me?"

Ye Tian sneered.

Immediately, Ye Tian threw the Vast Sea Ancestor into the inner world.

Then, he waited here for the Void Sacred Fruit to ripen.

"Strange, how do I feel like I have a faint connection to this Void Sacred Tree?"

Ye Tian said curiously.

Before, when he hadn't entered this place, he didn't have this feeling, but as soon as he entered this space, he felt a faint connection, but he couldn't say anything about it.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian used his copying talent to shroud the Void Sacred Tree.

At this point, the mutation began.

Rumble!!!!!!

Ye Tian's copying talent seemed to have entered a special void and saw a phantom.

This is the phantom of an old man, standing there, as if he is far above the domain ancestor.

Very strong!

Even on the Superior Domain Ancestor, Ye Tian did not sense this coercion.

"Could it be the ancestor?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

But wasn't this Void Sacred Tree planted by the Ancestor of the Great Sea, how could it have anything to do with the Ancestor?

"Hahaha, Replica Talent Inheritor, you're finally here!"

The old man spoke.

As soon as these words came out, Ye Tian was stunned.

Replicating Talent Inheritors?

This shows that the old man knows him and knows the talent of copying.

He'd never told anyone about copying talent!

"It's hard to ......"

Ye Tian had some guesses in his heart.

"I'm just a little bit of power that spans time and space, just to wait for the inheritor of the Replication Talent. Only when the Replica Talent Inheritor enters here can this power be stimulated and let me appear. If no one comes, then this force will be silent forever. I don't know who you are, but I know you're definitely here. You may not even know where it came from, or even wonder where it came from? I once got a slate, and this slate is a special treasure that I have studied, and it has something to do with talent. Unfortunately, even I can't use it, I just know that it can replicate any talent. This kind of thing is so wicked, I don't dare tell anyone. In an accident, I realized that I was about to fall, so I left the slate behind. In the future, no matter who it falls into, it will only choose those it approves. Remember, don't give away the secret of copying talents. I don't even know the potential of this talent. "

"I have left a legacy within the Void Sacred Tree, remember my name, the Void Ancestor!"

Rumble!!!

The figure of the Void Ancestor turned into a tome, which was entirely composed of forbidden rules and was full of endless mysteries.

Ye Tian's consciousness contained this book.

Wow!

The classics entered Ye Tian's soul, and with the entry of Ye Tian's consciousness, countless contents and inheritances entered Ye Tian's memory.

Not only does this have a lot of knowledge, but there is also an extremely precious inheritance - the Ancestral Law!

The so-called Ancestor Law is just one word, a word of inheritance that is completely condensed by its own way, and the inheritance of the Void Ancestor is - emptiness!

He is proficient in the way of space, the ultimate point formed by the condensation of all the ways of space, that is, the Ancestor Law of Emptiness!

If you want to become an ancestor, you must master the Ancestor Law!

You can practice someone else's Ancestral Method, or you can create your own Ancestral Method.

However, if you want to create your own Ancestral Method, you can't do it at all, and at least you need to get someone else's Ancestral Method, so that you can comprehend your own Ancestral Method.

Therefore, the inheritance of the ancestral law is almost a necessary inheritance.

If there is no Ancestor Law, then don't even think about breaking through to the Ancestor Realm in that life, unless you encounter an opportunity that even the Ancestor is greedy.

But in such an opportunity, the ancestors have to desperately snatch it, and there is no supreme ancestor, why should they snatch it?

"I actually obtained an Ancestor Method, and it is a Space Ancestor Method, which is also too precious!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The Space Ancestor Law is roughly divided into three parts: the Ancestor Battle Body, the Ancestor Dao, and the Power of the Ancestor, and the entry requirement for cultivation is the Supreme Domain Ancestor, if you don't have the strength of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, don't think about cultivating the Ancestral Method, you can't practice it at all, and it's a waste of time.

In addition, Ye Tian also knows a lot of knowledge, which can reduce many wrong paths for the future.

In short, this Void Ancestor's inheritance was too precious, it was simply many times more precious than the Holy Technique.

It's a pity that this inheritance does not include holy skills.

This is also very normal, after all, the Holy Technique needs to create inheritance, and the Void Ancestor doesn't have time to create two inheritances.

Moreover, the Holy Technique was not a precious thing to the Void Ancestor, and the Ten Holy Gates of the Dark Sanctuary had many Holy Techniques, so the Void Ancestor was too lazy to create the Divine Skill Inheritance.

"I have obtained the inheritance method of the Void Ancestor, even if I can't comprehend my own Ancestor Method in the future, I am sure that I will be promoted to the Ancestor. Coupled with the copying talent, even among the Ancestors, I'm afraid I can be enough to become the top Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

At this moment, his future is bright.

If the Supreme Domain Ancestors knew about Ye Tian's encounter, they would probably be extremely jealous.
